vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat

vllm.title: [Kernel] Marlin_24: Ensure the mma.sp instruction is using the ::ordered_metadata modifier (introduced with PTX 8.5)
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A recently released PTX 8.5 (on May 9, 2024) introduced a new modifier, called ordered_metadata, for the mma.sp 2:4 warp sparse instruction. This modifier requires that the indices in the sparsity metadata are sorted in an increasing order starting from the LSB bit. In our case, in format_24.py line
